violations.text: The coving underneath shelving in the (back hallway storage) area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025

At the time of inspection, the Certified Food Safety Manager License registered with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection for the location, was observed to be expired. Application was printed and left with the PIC at the time of inspection. Application is to be submitted as soon as possible. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

At the time of inspection, the hand sink located directly next to the sandwich prep station was observed to single-use bags and a box of gloves stored at it. A HANDWASHING SINK shall be maintained so that it is accessible at all times for EMPLOYEE use and may not be used for purposes other than handwashing. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

The non-food-contact surfaces of the toaster oven and cold drawer unit at the prep/heating station were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food-contact surfaces are to be cleaned at a frequency necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/04/2024

Old rodent droppings were observed in the dry storage area. Establishment to clean dry storage area and if any new droppings are observed, report findings to pest control. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2023
